---
name: Connector request
about: Request a new data source connector for PriceRecon
title: '[CONNECTOR] '
labels: connector
assignees: ''
---

## Connector Information
- **Source Name**: (e.g., "NewEgg", "GearBest", "Local classifieds site")
- **Source URL**: (e.g., https://www.example.com)
- **Source Type**: (Retailer / Marketplace / Signal / Deal forum / Other)

## Why This Connector?
Why would this connector be valuable for PriceRecon users?
- What unique listings/inventory does it have?
- What geographic region does it cover?
- What pricing/niche does it serve?

## Access Requirements
How does this source provide data?
- [ ] Public website (no authentication required)
- [ ] Requires account/API key
- [ ] Has official API
- [ ] Only accessible via web scraping
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Authentication (if applicable)
If the source requires authentication:
- What credentials are needed? (e.g., email/password, API key, OAuth)
- Is there a documented API?
- Are there rate limits?

## Data Structure
What information is available from listings?
- Product title/name
- Price
- Condition (new/used/refurbished)
- Images
- Seller information
- Shipping cost
- Location
- Stock status

## Existing Integration
Are you aware of existing integrations?
- [ ] Yes, I've seen other tools integrate with this source
- [ ] No
- Links to examples:

## Technical Notes
Any technical considerations:
- JavaScript-rendered content?
- Anti-bot protections?
- Rate limiting?
- Captchas?
- Mobile vs desktop site differences?

## Willing to Help?
- [ ] I'd like to contribute the connector implementation
- [ ] I can provide test accounts/credentials (private communication)
- [ ] I can help test once implemented
- [ ] I'm just proposing the idea
